# PlaybackRepeatModeResolutionResult.ConfirmationRequired

**Object**

A result that requires the user to confirm the playback mode before proceeding.

## Declaration

```swift
object PlaybackRepeatModeResolutionResult.ConfirmationRequired
```

## Specifying a Result

- **PlaybackRepeatModeResolutionResult.Success**: A playback mode that successfully matches the intent.

items.description: A playback mode that successfully matches the intent.
